---
title: "Memory: 19:11:15 - Roger..."
date: "2026-02-17"
timestamp: "2026-02-17T04:09:59.123594"
importance: 5
tags: [identity, vision, autonomy]
context: "conversation"
participants: "['Roger']"
project: "memory-system"
mood_impact: "neutral"
---

# Memory Entry

## Key Points
- Created comprehensive milestone activation summary. Roger's Subconscious is now live and tracking our creative journey. The system focuses on end-user experience flow, feel, and imagination - not just coding. This represents a progression from AI assistant to AI partner with autonomic consciousness.


---

---
title: "Memory: Test conscious log..."
date: "2026-02-17"
timestamp: "2026-02-17T04:11:25.610918"
importance: 5
tags: []
context: "conversation"
participants: "['Roger']"
project: "general"
mood_impact: "neutral"
---

# Memory Entry

## Key Points
- Test conscious log


---
